_comment: STAGING DATA — 60-day alternating Psalter cycle, transcribed directly from the BCP 2019 Daily Office Lectionary DOCX (59-Daily-Office-Lectionary-12.15.2021.docx), the PSALTER–MP / PSALTER–EP columns printed alongside each month's Lesson tables — not from a third party, no THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md entry needed. NOT yet consumed by the calendar engine (that is issue #9); no <EmbeddedResource> entry yet. Keyed by MM-DD like acna-bcp2019-daily-office-lessons.json (02-29 included for leap years). Each office is { "psalms": [...] } for a list of whole Psalms read that office, or a single-element citation with "translationCode": "NCP" for a verse-range citation (mirrors LectionaryReading.TranslationCode already used for Sunday-lectionary Psalms — replaces the DOCX's literal trailing ‘v’ versification marker, e.g. "78:41-73v"). Christmas Day (12-25) Morning Prayer is the sole exception to the pattern: the BCP names two specific alternative Psalms ("19 or 45"), represented as psalms:["19"], alternatePsalms:["45"]. See docs/decisions/0004-daily-office-marker-semantics.md and docs/audits/2026-07-08-daily-office-psalter-sourcing.md.
